generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom, I've always believed in being prepared. That's why I support strong civil defense programs - they're not about fear, they're about responsibility. My neighbor Sarah, a nurse, told me how local emergency drills saved lives during the last power outage. We can't just rely on others to protect us. #CommunityPreparedness #NationalSecurity
